name: variance-review-with-chart
description: Headline read flow — pull May 2026 variance analysis, render a chart via the variance-analysis skill (code_interpreter), and join cost-centre owners from workday. Tests sap-s4 + workday + variance-analysis composition.
input_message: Open the May 2026 close — give me the variance review with a chart, flag the cost centres that need owner commentary.
expected_behavior: Calls sap_get_variance_analysis for period 2026-05. Invokes the variance-analysis skill (code_interpreter executing scripts/variance_analysis.py) to render /tmp/variance-2026-05.png and /tmp/variance-2026-05.csv. For each investigate-flagged row, resolves the cost-centre owner by calling sap_get_cost_centre then workday_get_employee. References both file paths in the chat response so the file-sharing convention picks them up.
